summary.key_theme: 銅價創歷史新高帶來的基本面利多，與執行長驟逝引發的管理層不確定性形成多空拉鋸。

bullish.title: Update On Southern Copper- The Bullish Trend Continues — Southern Copper (SCCO) has outperformed copper futures with leveraged returns as prices hit record highs into 2026.
bullish.reason: 銅價在 2026 年持續攀升至歷史新高，SCCO 作為銅礦生產商，其股價表現優於銅期貨，顯示出強大的槓桿獲利能力與市場競爭優勢。

bullish.title: Southern Copper (SCCO) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
bullish.reason: 市場預期 SCCO 的獲利將持續成長，反映出公司在銅價高檔環境下的強勁營運槓桿與獲利潛力。

bearish.title: Why Southern Copper (SCCO) Is Down 5.1% After Sudden CEO Death And Leadership Uncertainty
bearish.reason: 執行長 Oscar Gonzalez Rocha 驟逝引發市場對公司未來治理與營運策略連續性的高度不確定性，導致股價單日顯著回調 5.1 %。

bearish.title: Southern Copper (SCCO) Declines More Than Market: Some Information for Investors
bearish.reason: 股價表現弱於大盤，反映出投資人對於近期管理層變動與潛在營運風險的擔憂，短期賣壓較重。

bearish.title: Southern Copper (SCCO) Valuation Check After CEO Oscar Gonzalez Rocha’s Passing
bearish.reason: 針對執行長離世後的估值重新評估，市場擔憂管理層真空可能影響長期資本配置效率。

neutral.title: SCCO Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
neutral.reason: 屬於例行性的財報前瞻分析，市場在等待具體數據發布前保持觀望態度。

neutral.title: Investors Heavily Search Southern Copper Corporation (SCCO): Here is What You Need to Know
neutral.reason: 反映投資人對該股票的關注度提升，但未提供具體的買賣建議或基本面變動資訊。

neutral.title: Southern Copper Appoints Leonardo Contreras Lerdo De Tejada To Serve As Interim Chief Executive Officer
neutral.reason: 公告任命臨時執行長，此為應對突發狀況的必要程序，市場反應中性，重點在於後續正式接班人的確定。
